svg.text: LAO
Running Text — Four Passages + Bridge Phrase
— I. PHAXITH — PROVERB —
ໄດ້ຢິນ ເບິ່ງດີ ບໍ່ເຕັ້ນຕົບເງິນ
dai-yin beuang-di boh-tan-top-ngoen = received-hearing good cannot-answer-money
"Good advice received cannot be repaid with money." (Lao proverb on wisdom)
— II. KHWAM JAM — ON MEMORY —
ການໄວ້ໃຈ ຂອງຄົນໃນອດີຕ ເປັນໂຊກຊະຕາເດີນນາ
kan-wai-chai khong-khon nai-a-dit pen-chok-cha-ta-doen-na
"Trusting the people of the past is the good fortune that moves us forward."
— III. SANYALAK — ON KNOWLEDGE —
ພູມີປັນຍາ ຜູ້ນັ້ນບໍ່ເຄຍອດຫອກ
phu-mi-panya phunun boh-koei-ot-hok = one-who-has-wisdom that-one never-thirsty
"One who has wisdom is never thirsty [for understanding]." (Lao educational saying)
— IV. NA — FORWARD —
ຮາເດີນນາ ໂດຍຈົ່ບໍ່ລືມຕົນເຫງໃນອດີຕ
hao-doen-na doi-job-boh-leum ton-heng nai-a-dit
"We walk forward without forgetting our roots in the past." (guiding principle)
— V. BRIDGE PHRASE —
ສິ່ງນີ້ເປັນສິ່ງທີ່ທໍຯສາງໃຫ້ເຈົ້ສົ
ບໍ່ເພີຍໃຊ້ເງິນ ໂດຍຜູ້ຄົນທີ່ຈົ່ນຳໃຈນາ
sing-ni pen-sing-thi-thao-sang-hai-jao = this-thing is-the-thing-that-they-made-for-you
boh-phia-chai-ngoen = without-cost (free) doi-phu-khon = by-people
thi-job-nam-jai-na = who-hold-the-spirit-forward
"This was made for you, freely, by people who remembered forward."
— BRIDGE PHRASE — NOTES —
Na (ໜ້າ) = face/front/forward. Nam-jai (ນຳໃຈ) = "water-heart" = spirit/memory/intention.
Job-nam-jai-na = "hold the spirit forward" captures deliberate forward memory.
Boh-phia-chai-ngoen = "not necessary to pay money" = free of charge.
— LANGUAGE NOTES —
Lao: ~7 million L1 speakers; official language of Laos.
Language family: Tai-Kadai (Kra-Dai), same branch as Thai, Shan, Zhuang.
Spoken across Isan (northeastern Thailand) by ~20 million as a dialect of Lao/Thai.
Script: closely related to Thai script, both from Khmer/Brahmic origin.
REMEMBER FORWARD — PLATE 41D — LAO: RUNNING TEXT — rememberforward.org — CC BY-SA 4.0
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
